tagline: June 20, 2026 The Netskope Logs connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
what_it_does: June 20, 2026 The Netskope Logs connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. The connector allows you to ingest event and alert logs from Netskope into Databricks.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
